SOM：用于虚拟机教学和研究的最小 Smalltalk

SOM: A minimal Smalltalk for teaching of and research on Virtual Machines

som-st.github.io 作者 tosh 分数 47 评论 0 2026/04/07 02:54
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 过去使用过 SOM 的论文和大学的简短且不完整的列表。
  2. Actor 语言的高效、确定性记录和重播 D. Aumayr、S. Marr、C. Béra、E. Gonzalez Boix、H. Mössenböck 第 15 届托管语言和运行时国际会议论文集，ManLang'18，ACM，2018，doi：10.1145/3237009.3237015， PDF。
  3. 很少的多功能集合与许多专业集合：如何设计用于探索性编程的集合库？ S. Marr, B. Daloze 编程体验研讨会论文集，PX/18，2018，doi：10.1145/3191697.3214334，HTML，PDF。
  4. 完全反射执行环境：用于更灵活软件的虚拟机 G. Chari、D. Garbervetsky、S. Marr、S. Ducasse IEEE 软件工程汇刊，IEEE TSE，2018，doi：10.1109/TSE.2018.2812715，PDF。
  5. 用于多范式并发调试工具的并发无关协议 S. Marr、C. Torres Lopez、D. Aumayr、E. Gonzalez Boix、H. Mössenböck 第 13 届 ACM SIGPLAN 国际动态语言研讨会论文集，DLS'17，ACM，2017，doi： 10.1145/3133841.3133842，HTML，PDF。

Original Summary

  1. A brief and incomplete list of papers and universities where SOM has been used in the past.
  2. Efficient and Deterministic Record & Replay for Actor Languages D. Aumayr, S. Marr, C. Béra, E. Gonzalez Boix, H. Mössenböck Proceedings of the 15th International Conference on Managed Languages and Runtimes, ManLang'18, ACM, 2018, doi: 10.1145/3237009.3237015, PDF.
  3. Few Versatile vs. Many Specialized Collections: How to design a collection library for exploratory programming? S. Marr, B. Daloze Proceedings of Programming Experience Workshop, PX/18, 2018, doi: 10.1145/3191697.3214334, HTML, PDF.
  4. Fully Reflective Execution Environments: Virtual Machines for More Flexible Software G. Chari, D. Garbervetsky, S. Marr, S. Ducasse IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering, IEEE TSE, 2018, doi: 10.1109/TSE.2018.2812715, PDF.
  5. A Concurrency-Agnostic Protocol for Multi-Paradigm Concurrent Debugging Tools S. Marr, C. Torres Lopez, D. Aumayr, E. Gonzalez Boix, H. Mössenböck Proceedings of the 13th ACM SIGPLAN International Symposium on Dynamic Languages, DLS'17, ACM, 2017, doi: 10.1145/3133841.3133842, HTML, PDF.
